'''Embaril''' was a beautiful [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]], notable for its rolling green hills and crystalline lakes that attracted [[Noble/Legends|nobles]] from across the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]'' {{1stm}}
